summary: Complete testing of Frameflow P0-P5 features. Fixed ENCRYPTION_KEY issue in backend/.env causing Fernet key validation error. All major features verified working: Demo login flow, Dashboard with quick actions, Content Command Center with AI generation, Reel concept generation, Best Posting Times API, Scheduled Posts CRUD, Analytics Dashboard with demo data, Integrations page with Instagram/Meta Ads options, Content Scheduler with calendar, Admin panel.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: ENCRYPTION_KEY in backend/.env was invalid - replaced with proper Fernet key
AI content generation via GPT-5.2 working
Demo mode creates user and provides full app access

success_rate.backend: 100% - All API endpoints tested and working

test_credentials.demo_login: Click 'Try Demo Free' button on landing page

seed_data_creation: Demo user created via /api/demo/login with Urban Brew Café brand
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Fixed encryption key issue. Backend APIs tested via curl on localhost:8001. Frontend pages all loading correctly via Playwright. AI content generation takes ~10 seconds. Instagram/Meta OAuth UI present but requires user's Meta App credentials to actually connect.

features_verified.landing_page: PASS - Try Demo Free button works
features_verified.demo_login: PASS - Creates user and navigates to dashboard
features_verified.dashboard: PASS - Quick actions, stats, campaigns display correctly
features_verified.content_command_center: PASS - Brand selector, content types, AI generation working
features_verified.analytics_dashboard: PASS - Demo data displays correctly with charts
features_verified.content_scheduler: PASS - Calendar loads with scheduled posts
features_verified.integrations_page: PASS - Instagram and Meta Ads connection options displayed
features_verified.admin_panel: PASS - Admin can view users and platform stats
features_verified.navigation: PASS - All sidebar navigation items working

mocked_apis.Instagram_OAuth: Backend ready but requires META_APP_ID and META_APP_SECRET env vars
mocked_apis.Analytics_Live_Data: Shows demo data when Instagram not connected
